name: Cortex Xpanse
description: Active attack surface management solution providing continuous internet asset discovery, risk assessment, and automated remediation of exposures across the entire external attack surface

auth_config.note: Advanced auth: HMAC-SHA256 digest in Authorization + x-xdr-*

actions.name: List External Services
actions.description: Retrieve a list of discovered external-facing services and their risk assessment

parameters.name: request_data
parameters.description: Request body containing filters and search parameters

actions.name: Get External Service Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific external service including configuration and exposures

parameters.name: service_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the external service

actions.name: List Domain Assets
actions.description: Retrieve discovered domain assets in the attack surface

actions.name: List IP Range Assets
actions.description: Retrieve discovered IP range assets in the attack surface

actions.name: List Issues
actions.description: Retrieve all security issues and exposures found across the attack surface

parameters.name: request_data
parameters.description: Request body with filters for issue type, severity, and status

actions.name: Get Issue Updates
actions.description: Retrieve updates and changes to issues including status transitions and remediation actions

parameters.name: request_data
parameters.description: Request body with time range and filter criteria

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Set to 'issue' to include full issue information in response

actions.name: List Incidents
actions.description: Retrieve security incidents generated from attack surface findings

actions.name: Update Issue
actions.description: Update the status or assignee of a specific issue

parameters.name: issue_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the issue to update

parameters.name: assignee
parameters.description: Email of the user to assign the issue to
